content.json:
## 🤖 UDCSP — AI decision traces

Every AI verdict emitted by the platform agents (eligibility, classifier, topic-router, citizen-assistant, voice-realtime) lands in `customEvents` with a `traceparent` and an `operation_Id`. This workbook shows the verdicts in the selected window, the decision mix, and lets you drill into the underlying transaction via the `operation_Id` link in App Insights → Transaction search. Auditors rely on this view for EU AI Act art. 14 evidence.

content.query:
customEvents
| where name has_any ('eligibility', 'decision', 'classifier', 'verdict', 'topic_router', 'tool_call', 'intent')
| extend decision = tostring(coalesce(
    customDimensions['decision'],
    customDimensions['verdict'],
    customDimensions['intent'],
    customDimensions['tool'],
    customDimensions['routedTo']))
| where isnotempty(decision)
| summarize Count=count() by decision
| order by Count desc

customEvents
| where name has_any ('eligibility', 'decision', 'classifier', 'verdict', 'topic_router', 'tool_call', 'intent')
| extend agent = tostring(coalesce(customDimensions['agent'], customDimensions['agentName'], cloud_RoleName, 'unknown'))
| summarize Verdicts=count() by bin(timestamp, 5m), agent
| order by timestamp asc

content.json: ### Recent verdicts (click `operation_Id` → Transaction search for full trace)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name has_any ('eligibility', 'decision', 'classifier', 'verdict', 'topic_router', 'tool_call', 'intent')
| extend
    decision   = tostring(coalesce(customDimensions['decision'], customDimensions['verdict'], customDimensions['intent'], customDimensions['tool'], customDimensions['routedTo'])),
    confidence = tostring(coalesce(customDimensions['confidence'], customDimensions['score'])),
    locale     = tostring(customDimensions['locale']),
    channel    = tostring(customDimensions['x-channel-actor']),
    agent      = tostring(coalesce(customDimensions['agent'], customDimensions['agentName'], cloud_RoleName))
| project timestamp, agent, decision, confidence, locale, channel, name, operation_Id
| order by timestamp desc
| take 100

customEvents
| where name has_any ('content-safety', 'safety.block', 'jailbreak', 'prompt.injection')
| project timestamp, name, customDimensions, operation_Id
| order by timestamp desc
| take 50

content.json:
---
## 🔗 Cross-resource view (Phase A — AOAI Request/Response logs)

The table below is the EU AI Act art. 12 evidence: every model call recorded by Azure Monitor on the AOAI account `udcspai`, with model deployment, latency and token consumption. Joinable to the workbook rows above via `operation_Id` (App Insights) ↔ `properties_s.requestId` (LAW) on the same W3C `traceparent`.
### AOAI calls — every model invocation (last hour or as chosen in the picker)

content.query:
workspace("/subscriptions/00b9d21c-db88-4467-9cb8-8e80c7f84190/resourceGroups/udcsp-no-observability-rg/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/udcsp-no-prod-law").AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES"
| where Category == "RequestResponse"
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, ModelDeploymentName_s, DurationMs, ResultSignature, requestId=tostring(properties_s.requestId), CorrelationId=tostring(properties_s.['ms-azureml-modelname'])
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100

workspace("/subscriptions/00b9d21c-db88-4467-9cb8-8e80c7f84190/resourceGroups/udcsp-no-observability-rg/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/udcsp-no-prod-law").AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES"
| where isnotempty(ModelDeploymentName_s)
| summarize PromptTokens=sum(toint(coalesce(properties_s.prompt_tokens, 0))), CompletionTokens=sum(toint(coalesce(properties_s.completion_tokens, 0))) by ModelDeploymentName_s
| order by PromptTokens desc

content.json:
> 🤖 **Native Foundry agent trace** (per-agent runs with cost, errors, tokens): <https://ai.azure.com/explore/aiservices/udcspai/observability>
>
> **AI Act art. 12 evidence trail**: this workbook → `operation_Id` drill → App Insights Transaction search → full W3C `traceparent` from ACS / web edge to model call. Retention configurable to 730 days in LAW (2× the art. 12.3 minimum).
